fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service contract or service contract quote.

fields.name: Contract Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the contract.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service contract.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Change Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a service contract or contract quote is locked or open for changes.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns the service items in the service contract/contract quote.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer in the service contract.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's address.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the city in where the customer is located.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you do business with the customer in this service contract.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference number.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson assigned to this service contract.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer to whom you will send the invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional line of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Serv. Contract Acc. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code associated with the service contract account group.

fields.name: Invoice Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice period for the service contract.

fields.name: Last Invoice Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when this service contract was last invoiced.

fields.name: Next Invoice Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the next invoice for this service contract.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the service contract.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service contract expires, which is when the service contract is no longer valid. The date is copied to the Contract Expiration Date field for a newly added service contract line. The date in this field must not be earlier than the value in the Starting Date field.

fields.name: First Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the first expected service for the service items in the contract.

fields.name: Max. Labor Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum unit price that can be set for a resource on all service orders and lines for the service contract.

fields.name: Calcd. Annual Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the Line Amount field values on all contract lines associated with the service contract or contract quote, disregarding starting date and expiration date.

fields.name: Annual Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount for all service contract lines that will be invoiced annually for the service contract or contract quote, disregarding starting date and expiration date. Changes to this amount will be distributed among the service contract lines.

fields.name: Amount per Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that will be invoiced for each invoice period for the service contract.

fields.name: Combine Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies you want to combine invoices for this service contract with invoices for other service contracts with the same bill-to customer.

fields.name: Prepaid
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this service contract is prepaid.

fields.name: Service Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service zone of the customer ship-to address.

fields.name: Cancel Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reason code for canceling the service contract.

fields.name: Last Price Update Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date you last updated the contract prices.

fields.name: Next Price Update Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the next date you want contract prices to be updated.

fields.name: Last Price Update %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price update percentage you used the last time you updated the contract prices.

fields.name: Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the response time for the service contract.

fields.name: Contract Lines on Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you want the lines for this contract to appear as text on the invoice.

fields.name: No. of Posted Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of posted service invoices linked to the service contract.

fields.name: No. of Unposted Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of unposted service invoices linked to the service contract.

fields.name: Service Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies a default service period for the items in the contract.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that calculates the payment due date, payment discount date, and payment discount amount.

fields.name: Invoice after Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can only invoice the contract if you have posted a service order since last time you invoiced the contract.

fields.name: Quote Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service contract quote.

fields.name: Allow Unbalanced Amounts
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the contents of the Calcd. Annual Amount field are copied into the Annual Amount field in the service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Contract Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract group code assigned to the service contract.

fields.name: Service Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order type assigned to service orders linked to this contract.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Accept Before
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date before which the customer must accept this contract quote.

fields.name: Automatic Credit Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a credit memo is created when you remove a contract line.

fields.name: Price Update Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price update period for this service contract.

fields.name: Price Inv. Increase Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the standard text code printed on service invoices, informing the customer which prices have been updated since the last invoice.

fields.name: Print Increase Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the standard text code printed on service invoices, informing the customer which prices have been updated since the last invoice.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency used to calculate the amounts in the documents related to this contract.

fields.name: Probability
fields.tooltip: Specifies the probability of the customer approving the service contract quote.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center, such as a distribution hub, that is associated with the involved user, company, customer, or vendor.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer phone number.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's email address.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county of the address.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: No. of Posted Credit Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of posted credit memos linked to this service contract.

fields.name: No. of Unposted Credit Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of unposted credit memos linked to the service contract.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to make payment, such as with bank transfer, cash, or check.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Direct Debit Mandate ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct-debit mandate that the customer has signed to allow direct-debit collection of payments.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact who will receive the service delivery.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.
